**Acceptance Criteria**

CFGA-01 is met. `validate_scope` resolves the container type, looks up the applicable `GraphTemplate`, and passes that template’s breakdown node type into the pure scope walk at [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:673). Tests cover the custom template-driven boundary in [scope_validation_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/scope_validation_tests.rs:276).

CFGA-02 is met. `resolve_plan_content` derives breakable container types from `TemplateRegistry::breakable_types()` and external plan locations from `GraphTemplate::plan_doc_location()` at [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:462). External template doc paths using `{container.id}` are resolved in [plan_doc.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan_doc.rs:160), with test coverage at [plan_doc.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan_doc.rs:303) and [scope_validation_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/scope_validation_tests.rs:465).

**Architecture And Separation**

No blocking boundary violation found. Domain scope logic remains pure in [queries.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/queries.rs:232). Template/config orchestration stays in commands, and plan document file I/O remains isolated to the command boundary module [plan_doc.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan_doc.rs:1).

**Functional Paradigm**

The changed validation path uses iterator-oriented filtering and mapping in [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:480). The domain graph traversal remains an appropriate imperative BFS exception for graph walking.

**Correctness And Invariants**

No new file writes, state transitions, event mutations, gate transition logic, assignee parsing, label parsing, or PID handling were introduced in the reviewed Rust paths. Scope halting now correctly treats `None` as “no applicable template” in [queries.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/queries.rs:180). External plan paths are repo-root-relative as documented and implemented at [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:477).

**Safety**

No unsafe code found in the changed paths. The workspace already enforces `#![deny(unsafe_code)]`.

**Testing**

I did not rerun cargo tests because the issue has a succeeded cargo-ci gate. Latest recorded cargo-ci evidence is `.jit/gate-runs/472d03f6-6f4a-40ad-959a-3ccd09ba0826/result.json`: status `passed`, exit code `0`, `2142 passed, 0 failed, 9 ignored`. `git diff --check` is clean. I ran `./scripts/jit-validate.sh`; it passed with label warnings only, which are allowed.

**Error Handling**

The new fallible external plan loading path preserves `Result`-based error handling and wraps `PlanDocError` with contextual messages through `load_plan_content` at [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:499). No new `unwrap()` or `expect()` appears in non-test implementation code in the reviewed files.

**CLI Contract**

No CLI command surface was changed, so no new `--json` contract issue was introduced.

**Documentation**

The prior stale public docs have been corrected. `bracket_scope_ids` now documents caller/template-derived boundary semantics at [queries.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/domain/queries.rs:173), and plan-doc docs now describe graph-template `doc` source of truth at [plan_doc.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan_doc.rs:3). Public APIs touched here include examples.

**Prior Review Feedback**

Resolved. The previous blocking finding about stale `[planning]` / `PlanningConfig` docs in `queries.rs` and `plan_doc.rs` is no longer present in those docs.

**Jit Issue Management**

The listed dependency `3143ad87` is marked `done`. `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passed with warnings only.
